perFrameInitCode: //---------- some global vars, do not change -------------
start = 1; travel = 0; RotZ = 0; look = 0; slow = 0; t0 = time+3; lampx = .5; lampy = .5;
PosX = rand(5)-2;   PosY = rand(5)-2;   PosZ = rand(5)-2;
//  PosX = 3.3; PosY = 2; PosZ = -2; ran1 = 0; ran2 = 0; ran3 = 0; //#
c1 = cos(ran1); c2 = cos(ran2); c3 = cos(ran3);
s1 = sin(ran1); s2 = sin(ran2); s3 = sin(ran3);
//Coord. Trans. must exactly match def in warp S. !!!!
uvx = reg26*dist/q7; uvy = reg27*dist/q7; uvz = reg28*dist/q7;
uvx += PosX; uvy += PosY; uvz += PosZ;
uvx0 = uvx+q8; uvy0 = uvy+q8; uvz0 = uvz+q8;
uvx = if (slen < 0.25, uvx*4, if (slen < 1, uvx/slen, uvx)) *2.6 + uvx0;
uvy = if (slen < 0.25, uvy*4, if (slen < 1, uvy/slen, uvy)) *2.6 + uvy0;
uvz = if (slen < 0.25, uvz*4, if (slen < 1, uvz/slen, uvz)) *2.6 + uvz0;
